title: Ore Detector
description: This datapack adds ore detector to the game. The ore detector shows if there is ore nearby.
body:
# ūüíé Ore Detector

### This datapack adds ore detector to the game. The ore detector shows if there is ore nearby.
![Ore Detector](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HM8KhJMj/images/03d873c7ec381a2a7f89e0c83b1aa4182a3a8611.png)

## ‚ú® Features
- Ore detection up to 10x10x10 blocks
- Detection within 5 seconds
- 5 seconds cooldown
- !! The compass does not show the location of the ore !!
- Detecting deepslate ores

## ūüß™ Recipe
You can get ore detector by placing the items in the crafting table with a compass in the middle and amethyst on all 4 sides.

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HM8KhJMj/images/06c217c552bbccbf67a2fd83816bd63a807d09f9.png)

## ūüßĪ Compatibility
- This datapack works on versions 1.21.2 and above

## ūüď¶ Installation

1. Download the datapack `.zip` file.
2. Place it in your world's `datapacks` folder.
3. Use `/reload` after joining the world.
4. You're all set! Move around and see your coordinates at the bottom of your screen.
